questions.clue: In the 1860s John Hanning Speke concluded that Lake Victoria was the source of this river

A popular tourist stop in this state is Natural Bridge in Daniel Boone National Forest

Lodgings in this capital city include the Hotel de l'Annapurna & the Hotel Himalaya

questions.answer: the USDA (United States Department of Agriculture)

final.clue: Excluding Russia, with over 81 million people, it's the most populous country in Europe
